scripts.clean: pnpm clean:bundle && pnpm clean:turbo && pnpm clean:node_modules
scripts.build: pnpm clean:bundle && turbo ready && turbo build
scripts.build:firefox: cross-env __FIREFOX__=true pnpm clean:bundle && turbo ready && cross-env __FIREFOX__=true turbo build
scripts.zip:firefox: cross-env __FIREFOX__=true pnpm build:firefox && cross-env __FIREFOX__=true pnpm -F zipper zip
scripts.dev: turbo ready && cross-env __DEV__=true turbo watch dev --concurrency 20
scripts.dev:firefox: cross-env __FIREFOX__=true turbo ready && cross-env __DEV__=true __FIREFOX__=true turbo watch dev --concurrency 20
scripts.e2e: pnpm build && pnpm zip && turbo e2e
scripts.e2e:firefox: cross-env __FIREFOX__=true pnpm build:firefox && cross-env __FIREFOX__=true pnpm zip:firefox && turbo e2e
